_comment: Recommended model lists for OAuth subscription channels. LIVE contract: this file is read into the provider descriptors at every boot, and subscription rows keep model_ids NULL so they always track it — editing the arrays (+ bumping last_updated) reaches every install at next boot, no migration needed (unlike seeds/providers.json, whose row updates go through alembic). API-key channels are NOT covered here; their models come from /v1/models auto-discovery + user manual entry on channel edit.
